title: T2 Producer/BA: build the BA agent (Producer / C2) — internals spec + v1 producer skill
prompt: Build the Producer (C2) — the morning BA agent. Its contract is pinned in docs/daily-operating-model.md par.3 (in = per-project state from the project-digest briefing; process = deep one-project-at-a-time conversation; out = tickets/specs into engine/store/queue/ per the .CONVENTION.md idiom); its internals are the open design this ticket closes. Design-first (size L): ship (a) docs/ba-agent-spec.md — session shape, 3-phase interview protocol (Brief via digest.py box -> deep interview -> read-back-approved emission), ticket-emission field contract, goal-plan-is-downstream-only boundary (David's session-7683bd09 correction), edges, v1 single-project limits with the T2-02/T2-04 upgrade path; (b) a v1 skill at .claude/skills/producer/ (SKILL.md, trigger-only description, hard never-dispatch rules) plus a stdlib-only emit-ticket.py helper that writes schema-valid queue tickets; (c) a dry-run self-test proving the emission mechanics into a scratch dir — NEVER the live queue (zero dryrun files may land in engine/store/queue/); (d) doc wiring (daily-operating-model par.7 row, north-star C2 one-line annotation WITHOUT claiming C2 done, INDEX.md line) and a backlog pilot note telling David how to run the first live morning, which is HITL and outside this ticket's verify. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T2-01-ba-agent.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: docs/ba-agent-spec.md exists and contains all 12 mandated sections (Contract (pinned), Boundaries, Session shape, Phase 1, Phase 2, Phase 3, Ticket contract, goal-plan seam, Edges, v1 limits, First live morning, Open questions). .claude/skills/producer/SKILL.md exists with a trigger-only 'Use when' description and a never-dispatch hard-rules block; .claude/skills/producer/emit-ticket.py --help exits 0, a scratch-dir emission produces a JSON whose ticket id matches ^\d{8}T\d{4}Z-<slug>$ with filename == ticket, kind=instruction, executor=swagger, requested_at in UTC Z format, non-empty prompt/verify, depends_on=[], and omitting --verify exits non-zero writing nothing. Negative: ls engine/store/queue/ | grep -ci dryrun returns 0; no producer skill was added to appydave-plugins; docs/north-star.md contains no line marking C2 with a done checkmark; marshall/swagger skills untouched. docs/INDEX.md, docs/north-star.md and docs/daily-operating-model.md each reference ba-agent-spec; exactly one backlog/*ba-agent-pilot.md exists; the feat(producer) commit is pushed and git status is clean of the ticket's files.
